description: Premium fitness studio and personal training. Expert coaches, modern equipment, and a community that pushes you to your best.

classes.name: HIIT
classes.description: High-intensity interval training that torches calories and builds explosive power. No two sessions are the same.

classes.name: Spin
classes.description: Rhythm-driven cycling with energy that fills the room. Build endurance while the playlist keeps you moving.

classes.name: Boxing
classes.description: Learn proper form, footwork, and combinations. Full-body conditioning that sharpens your mind and body.

classes.name: Yoga
classes.description: Restore balance and flexibility. From power flows to restorative sessions, find your center on the mat.

classes.name: Strength Training
classes.description: Structured lifting sessions focused on progressive overload. Build muscle, gain strength, see results.

classes.name: CrossFit
classes.description: Functional fitness at high intensity. Olympic lifts, gymnastics, and metabolic conditioning in one session.

trainers.name: Marcus Johnson
trainers.bio: 10+ years transforming athletes and everyday warriors. Specializes in powerlifting and athletic performance.

trainers.name: Aisha Williams
trainers.bio: Energy personified. Aisha's classes are where you push past limits you didn't know you had.

trainers.name: David Chen
trainers.bio: Former amateur champion turned coach. Teaches technique-first boxing for all skill levels.

trainers.name: Sofia Martinez
trainers.bio: Movement is medicine. Sofia blends traditional yoga with modern mobility science for lasting results.
